concepts: Model evaluation metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score)

soft_skills: Ability to communicate insights clearly to non-technical audiences
Strong analytical and critical thinking skills
Attention to detail and data accuracy
Ability to present findings and tell a story with data
responsibilities: Analyse datasets to extract meaningful insights
Clean and preprocess data for analysis and modelling
Perform exploratory data analysis and visualisation
Apply statistical methods to answer business questions
